File umi_sysex.hh

↰ Parent directory (protocol)

UMI SysEx Protocol - main include file.

Contents

  • Definition (protocol/umi_sysex.hh)

  • Detailed Description

  • Includes

  • Included By

  • Namespaces

  • Classes

  • Enums

  • Typedefs

Definition (protocol/umi_sysex.hh)

  • Program Listing for File umi_sysex.hh

Detailed Description

This file aggregates all protocol components. For smaller builds, include individual headers directly.

Includes

  • commands.hh (File commands.hh)

  • cstring

  • encoding.hh (File encoding.hh)

  • message.hh (File message.hh)

  • standard_io.hh (File standard_io.hh)

  • umi_auth.hh (File umi_auth.hh)

  • umi_bootloader.hh (File umi_bootloader.hh)

  • umi_firmware.hh (File umi_firmware.hh)

  • umi_session.hh (File umi_session.hh)

Included By

  • File umi_object.hh

  • File umi_state.hh

  • File umi_transport.hh
